title: Replace hlx self-update with GitHub release assets
description: Walkthrough of the BLD-527 implementation: CI workflow for prebuilt release artifacts, rewritten update module with staged download-validate-swap, and documentation updates.

steps.title: New CI workflow for prebuilt release artifacts
steps.description: Triggers on push to main. Builds, tests, creates a tarball (dist/ + skill-content/ + package.json + build-metadata.json), and publishes it as a GitHub Release under a rolling 'latest' tag. The tag name 'latest' avoids matching 'v*' in publish.yml, preventing accidental npm publishes.

steps.title: GitHub auth token discovery
steps.description: getGitHubToken() tries GITHUB_TOKEN env var, then GH_TOKEN, then 'gh auth token' CLI command, finally returns null. Null is fine for public repos; private repos will get an explicit auth error downstream.

steps.title: GitHub REST API for release metadata
steps.description: fetchLatestRelease() replaces git ls-remote. Single API call to /repos/{owner}/{repo}/releases/tags/latest returns both the commit SHA (target_commitish) and the tarball download URL (assets[0].url). Handles 401/403 (auth required), 404 (no release), and network errors.

steps.title: Staged directory validation
steps.description: validateStaged() checks that dist/index.js and package.json exist in the staging directory, then runs 'node dist/index.js --version' with HLX_SKIP_UPDATE_CHECK=1 to confirm the candidate CLI can start. This replaces the old npm-path-dependent validation.

steps.title: Install root discovery via import.meta.url
steps.description: getInstallRoot() uses import.meta.url to find the package root (two directories up from dist/update/perform.js). Same proven pattern already used in version.ts and paths.ts.

steps.title: Safe rename with EXDEV and Windows fallbacks
steps.description: safeRename() attempts fs.renameSync first. If EXDEV (cross-filesystem), falls back to cp -R + rmSync. On Windows, retries once after a 500ms Atomics.wait() to handle file-locking edge cases.

steps.title: Staged update: download-extract-validate-swap
steps.description: performStagedUpdate() is the core update mechanism. Downloads tarball to ~/.hlx/staging/<sha>/, extracts via system tar, validates with validateStaged(), then does a rename-based swap with .bak backup dirs. On any swap failure, restores from backups. On success, cleans up staging and backups.

steps.title: Explicit GitHub auth error messaging
steps.description: When the GitHub API returns 401/403, runUpdate() exits with a clear message listing three auth options: GITHUB_TOKEN env var, GH_TOKEN env var, or 'gh auth login'. This satisfies the ticket requirement for explicit auth guidance.

steps.title: Auto-update with fail-open behavior
steps.description: checkAutoUpdate() uses the same staged update mechanism as runUpdate() but preserves fail-open semantics: on any failure (auth, network, download, swap), it logs a warning to stderr and returns without blocking command dispatch.
